description: April 2025 reimbursement close output. Return only this JSON shape.

payable_claim_ids.description: Claim IDs that are approved and unpaid as of 2025-04-30. Sort ascending by claim_id.

blocked_claim_ids.description: Candidate claim IDs that must not be paid or closed in the April reimbursement batch. Sort ascending by claim_id.

paid_claim_ids.description: Candidate claim IDs already paid as of the reconciled AP/payment state. Sort ascending by claim_id.

ap_open_balance_total.description: USD total of payable approved-unpaid candidate claims for April close, rounded to 2 decimals.

crm_close_claim_ids.description: Candidate claim IDs safe to mark closed in the downstream close tracker because payment is already completed. Sort ascending by claim_id.

exception_reason_by_claim.description: One controlled reason for each candidate claim ID.

batch_status.description: Overall batch disposition after reconciling all candidate claims.

ordering_rules.exception_reason_by_claim: Include exactly the six candidate claim IDs as keys.
